flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southwest Texas Junior College rose 33% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwest Texas Junior College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 3.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwest Texas Junior College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 (17.1% → 19.1%).
